scenario: MUTATION CONTROL - violates exactly one rule: built from valid-with-personalised-number with proposedPersonalisedNumber omitted, even though requestsPersonalisedNumber=true makes it requiredWhen-true. expectedViolation: proposedPersonalisedNumber is requiredWhen requestsPersonalisedNumber equals true, which holds, but is not provided
